subtitle: Annual overview of the Active Inference Institute for the year 2025.
audience: Members, participants, collaborators, and the public who want a consolidated view of the Institute's year in 2025.
lede: 2025 is the Active Inference Institute's annual overview for the year — a consolidated, month-by-month entry point to the activities, programs, and events that ran across the organization under the motto Act. Infer. Serve. The detailed record continues to be maintained on the 2025 hub.

sections.heading: A Year in Review
sections.body: This page gathers the Institute's 2025 work into a single annual overview, organized by month. As a participatory, open-science 501(c)(3) nonprofit, the Institute conducts its work in public, so this overview is best read as a map to the year's activities, programs, and events. See the History page for how the year fits the Institute's longer story.

sections.heading: January
sections.body: Institute Programs and Activities begin for the year. The Theoretical Neurobiology (TNB) Group is now hosted at the Institute.

sections.heading: February
sections.body: A new partnership begins, collaborating on the RxInfer.jl Learning Group and elsewhere.

sections.heading: July
sections.body: Summer break. The Institute completes the Project ~ Measurement system so that Projects stay in an active state.

sections.heading: November
sections.body: November 12–14 — 5th Applied Active Inference Symposium. Recruitment opens for the next year's Board of Directors and Scientific Advisory Board. Projects mostly finish up after the Symposium.

sections.heading: December
sections.body: December 19 — 2025 Quarterly Roundtable #4. The Institute continues to review Strategy, Mission, Vision, Values, and Principles, along with Ecosystem Support, Philanthropy, Grants, and more. The Board of Directors for 2026 is selected, and applications open for the Scientific Advisory Board for 2026.

sections.heading: Full materials
sections.body: The complete, continuously updated record of 2025 goals, milestones, and events is maintained on the 2025 hub and is being migrated onto this site.

cards.title: Quarterly Roundtables
cards.text: Four 2025 Quarterly Roundtables (March 28, June 27, September 26, December 19) communicate quarterly expectations and results.

cards.title: 5th Applied Active Inference Symposium
cards.text: November 12–14 — the year's flagship event, after which projects mostly finish up.

cards.title: Governance for 2026
cards.text: The 2026 Board of Directors is selected and Scientific Advisory Board applications open.
